additional_tags: Minho avoided eye contact as much as possible as he took in the small form, hurdled in the dark far corner. He was heaving from exhaustion, blonde hair disheveled and sticking to his face. Oversized clothes stuck to shaking limbs, drenched in sweat. Just like the other man, the omega was barefooted. additional_tags: Seungmin wants to throttle Hyunjin, because the last thing someone wants to see when they arrive home at night is one of their boyfriends passed out on the floor. He can’t get the image out of his head - Hyunjin on the floor, his slack face. Seungmin’s mother and her slack face.
